wifi.title: High-Speed Wi-Fi
wifi.description: Free stable internet connection in all rooms and the garden oasis.

location.title: In the Very Heart
location.description: Walkable central location close to main sights and transport.

garden.title: Green Garden Lounge
garden.description: A relaxed common area to meet other travelers.

lockers.title: Secure Storage
lockers.description: Personal lockers for your peace of mind and free luggage storage anytime.

flexibleAccess.title: No Curfew
flexibleAccess.description: Smart lock codes grant you secure access to the building 24/7.

laundry.title: Laundry Service
laundry.description: Self-service washing and drying machines available on-site.

rooms.title: Choose your stay
rooms.subtitle: Select between social single bed dorms or comfortable private rooms
rooms.upgradeNoticeHint: Upgrade instructions will be provided after booking completion
rooms.bookingUnavailableHint: Online booking is not available — contact reception to reserve.

singleBedDorm.title: Single Bed in Shared Dorm
singleBedDorm.description: Perfect for solo travelers and backpackers. Features comfortable mattresses, personal lockers, and individual power sockets next to your bed.

privateRoom.title: Private Room
privateRoom.description: Ideal for couples or digital nomads seeking privacy. Includes a spacious queen-size bed, private bathroom, and air conditioning.

timing.luggageAlert: You can arrive before {time} or leave your bags after check-out. Luggage storage at the reception is completely free!

payment.taxNote: Local tourist tax is excluded and paid on-site: {cost} per person per night.

quietHours.content: Quiet hours are from 10 PM to 8 AM. It is strictly forbidden to ring the doorbell. Use the app codes.

registration.content: We handle all police paperwork automatically upon check-in. You don't need to do anything.

smoking.content: Smoking inside is forbidden. Please use the street area or inner garden.

alcohol.content: Alcohol consumption is allowed, but bringing your own drinks from outside is prohibited. You can purchase drinks directly at our hostel bar.

laundry.content: Washing and drying service costs {cost}. Please contact the receptionist if you need to use the laundry.

bus.clarificationQuestion: Which direction or country did you arrive from?
bus.centralHint: EU routes, Croatia, Federation of BiH

taxiService.title: Official Taxi (Zuti Taxi)
taxiService.noAppsInfo: There is no Uber, Bolt, or Yandex in Sarajevo. Taxi can only be ordered via WhatsApp message or a regular phone call.
taxiService.standWarning: Take a taxi only from the official stands on the street. Never agree to fixed high prices offered by drivers waiting right by the bus platforms.
taxiService.meterWarning: Make sure the driver clears the meter and starts it at the official base rate (2.50 KM).
taxiService.costTemplate: The fair price from {location} to the hostel is around {minKM}–{maxKM} KM ({minEUR}–{maxEUR} €).

public.title: Trolleybus №103
public.summary: Cheapest option — trolleybus 103 to Čobanija, then a short walk to Dalmatinska 6.
public.text: Take trolleybus №103 directly to the city center. Tickets cost 1.80 KM at the kiosk or 2.00 KM from the driver (cash only). Remember to validate your ticket inside!
public.walkToStop: Walk about 14 minutes (1 km) out of the airport terminal to the 'Dobrinja škola' trolleybus stop.
public.walkToHostel: Cross the bridge over the river, turn left onto Main Street, and walk towards Dalmatinska 6.

taxi.costEstimation: The fair price from the airport to the hostel is around {minKM}–{maxKM} KM ({minEUR}–{maxEUR} €).

public.title: Trolleybus №103
public.summary: Direct route across the entity border to Čobanija, then walk to the hostel.
public.text: Take trolleybus №103 towards 'Trg Austrije'. Tickets are 1.80 KM in the kiosk or 2.00 KM from the driver in cash. Please validate it immediately.
public.walkToStop: Walk about 7 minutes (500 m) from the East Sarajevo station building to the 'Dobrinja' terminal trolleybus stop.
public.walkToHostel: Cross the bridge over the Miljacka river and walk straight towards Dalmatinska street.

taxi.costEstimation: A convenient way to cross the entity border directly to the hostel door. Average cost is around 15 KM.

public.title: Tram №1
public.summary: Fastest option — tram 1 to Pošta stop, hostel is around the corner.
public.text: Take Tram №1 directly to the hostel area. Tickets are 1.80 KM at the kiosk or 2.00 KM from the driver (cash only).
public.walkToStop: Exit the bus station and walk 1 minute (78 m) forward to the 'Željezniчка stanica' tram loop right on the square.
public.getOffAt: Get off at 'Pošta' stop. You will see a massive Post Office building.
public.walkToHostel: Walk up towards Dalmatinska 6 — we are right around the corner.

taxi.costEstimation: A short ride to the hostel. The price should not exceed 7–10 KM.

public.title: Tram №1
public.summary: Direct tram from the square to Pošta, ~3 min walk to the door.
public.text: Take Tram №1 towards 'Baščaršija'. Tickets cost 1.80 KM at the kiosk or 2.00 KM from the driver in cash.
public.walkToStop: Exit the railway station building. The tram loop is right in front of you on the main square (1 min walk).

taxi.costEstimation: The hostel is close, so the fair ride price on the taximeter is around 7–10 KM.

guide.title: Local Guide by {hostelName}
guide.subtitle: Handpicked places in Sarajevo to help you experience the city like a local without overpaying.

essentials.title: Important nearby
essentials.subtitle: ATM, shop, pharmacy, and late food — one tap to Maps.

exploreArrival.title: Explore the city
exploreArrival.subtitle: Our handpicked bars, cafes, food, and sights are ready when you are.
exploreArrival.teaserDescription: Bars, coffee shops, and viewpoints are tucked away for now. Open the full city guide whenever you want.

mapCard.title: {hostelName} Custom Google Map
mapCard.description: Opens directly in your Google Maps app with all our secret layers

guide.emptyCategory: No places found in this category.

atm.desc: Cash & ATMs — withdraw BAM (KM) at UniCredit or Raiffeisen ATMs on Dalmatinska, about a 2-minute walk from the hostel.

konzum.desc: Grocery store — nearest Konzum for water, snacks, and basics. Open late on most days except Sunday.

apoteka.desc: Pharmacy on Titova street for medicine, first aid, and travel essentials.

u2.desc: Late-night food — U2 Pizza stays open late, a reliable option if you arrive hungry after reception hours.

zeljo.desc: Traditional Bosnian food — legendary ćevapi at Baščaršija. The best local food experience in the heart of the old town.

mahir.desc: Pizza & grill — popular local pizzeria with generous portions and fair prices, a short walk from the city center.

edin.desc: Bakery — fresh burek, pastries, and coffee from one of Sarajevo's favourite neighbourhood bakeries.

vucko.desc: Pub & grill — cosy gastro pub with local beer and hearty Balkan plates, great for a relaxed evening.

ribica.desc: Hidden bar — tiny, quirky spot filled with vintage objects. A local favourite for an authentic Sarajevo night out.

kinobosna.desc: Live music venue — legendary Monday jam sessions and concerts in an old cinema hall. Check the schedule before you go.

fabrika.desc: Specialty coffee — third-wave roastery with excellent espresso and a calm workspace vibe.

habitus.desc: Brunch & coffee — stylish spot with healthy bowls, great coffee, and a terrace when the weather is nice.

yellowfort.desc: Viewpoint — stunning panoramic views. The perfect spot to watch the sunset over the entire city of Sarajevo.

exchangeOffice.name: Exclusive Exchange Office
exchangeOffice.description: Fair exchange rate from EUR to BAM (KM) with no hidden fees, just a 3-minute walk away.

supermarket.name: Bingo / Konzum Supermarket
supermarket.description: The closest grocery store to buy water, snacks, or personal items at normal local prices.

yellowBastion.name: Yellow Bastion (Žuta Tabija)
yellowBastion.description: Stunning panoramic viewpoint. The perfect spot to watch the sunset over the entire city of Sarajevo.

marketing.heroSubtitle: Your green oasis in the heart of Sarajevo

taxiService.standWarning: At TIV there is no official taxi queue inside the terminal. Use the desk in arrivals or ask the hostel to pre-book. Avoid drivers who approach you in the parking lot with inflated fixed prices.
taxiService.meterWarning: Agree a fixed fare to Kotor old town (usually €20–35) before you leave, or confirm the meter is running. Airport taxis often quote flat rates instead of the meter.

public.title: Bus via coastal road
public.summary: No bus at the terminal — walk to the highway or Tivat bus station, then a local bus to Kotor.
public.text: There is no bus stop at the airport building. Walk to the Adriatic highway (E65) and take any bus heading towards Kotor or Budva, or continue to Tivat bus station (~20 min walk) for a scheduled departure. Pay the driver in cash.
public.walkToStop: Exit the terminal, turn left and walk ~12 minutes along the access road until you reach the coastal highway and the bus stop.
public.getOffAt: Get off at Kotor bus station (Autobuska stanica Kotor). Some seasonal services may stop closer to the old town — ask the driver for Stari Grad.
public.walkToHostel: From Kotor bus station, walk downhill to Stari Grad. Continue to our hostel at {address}.

taxi.costEstimation: A direct taxi from Tivat Airport to Kotor is usually {minEUR}–{maxEUR} € depending on season and whether you pre-book.

public.title: Walk to old town
public.summary: Regional buses stop at Kotor bus station — the old town is about 15 minutes downhill on foot.
public.text: Regional buses from Dubrovnik, Podgorica, Budva and Tivat terminate at Kotor bus station. Follow signs to Stari Grad downhill along the main road. Suitcases on wheels are fine.
public.walkToStop: You are already at Kotor bus station when your intercity bus arrives.
public.getOffAt: Kotor bus station — final stop for most regional routes.
public.walkToHostel: Head towards the old town walls and the Sea Gate, then continue to our hostel at {address}.

taxi.costEstimation: A short taxi from the bus station to the old town is usually {minEUR}–{maxEUR} € — handy with heavy luggage.

guide.subtitle: Curated places around Kotor Bay — coming soon.

guide.emptyCategory: No places found in this category.

marketing.heroSubtitle: Your base for exploring the city

nightWarning.title: Important Information
nightWarning.description: You have checked in automatically. Please visit the reception in the morning from 08:00 to complete your payment and provide your passport for mandatory tourist registration.

videoTour.title: Video Tour Guide
videoTour.description: Short video: how to find your room, where to get bed linen, and quiet hour guidelines.

find.title: Recognize the hostel
find.banner: Compare this photo with what you see on the street — there may be no sign at night.

nightPreview.title: For your return tonight (after {time})
nightPreview.banner: Save these codes now. When reception is closed, use them instead of ringing the doorbell.

day.title: Ring the doorbell
day.banner: The doorbell button is located to the right of the entrance and is labeled with the hostel's name.

single.title: Ring at the entrance
single.banner: Use the doorbell at the main entrance — reception will let you in.

walkIn.title: Walk straight in
walkIn.banner: There is no building gate or doorbell — find the hostel using the photo above and head inside during reception hours.

doorbell.title: Ring at the hostel door
doorbell.banner: Go to the hostel door shown in the photo and ring the doorbell — reception will open for you.

reception.title: Head to reception
reception.banner: Enter the building and go to reception during opening hours. If you are unsure, message us on WhatsApp.

hostelOnly.title: Find the hostel door
hostelOnly.banner: There is no separate building code — go straight to the hostel door on your floor and ring the doorbell.

night.title: Late Self Check-In (After {time})
night.banner: The reception is closed. Please use the access codes below instead of the doorbell to avoid waking up other guests.

hostelOnly.title: Late Self Check-In (After {time})
hostelOnly.banner: Use the hostel door code below. There is no separate building entrance code.

doors.emptyState: Door access is not configured yet — ring the doorbell or contact reception.
doors.photosOnlyHint: Follow the photos to find the door. Reception will share access codes at check-in.
doors.noCodeHint: Code not set yet — ask reception or check your booking message.

subDoor.title: Hostel Door
subDoor.guide: Go down the stairs to the left of the main entrance, find the basement door, and enter the code.
subDoor.guideDirect: The hostel door is on your floor — use the photo to recognize it, then enter the code on the keypad.

timing.luggageAlert: You can arrive before {time} or leave your bags after check-out. Luggage storage at the reception is completely free!

payment.taxNote: Local tourist tax is excluded and paid on-site: {cost} per person per night.

guestCheckIn.hint: Trip tips and directions are open to everyone. Door codes and your bed map unlock after check-in — tap

tourismGate.title: Complete guest registration
tourismGate.description: Your accommodation needs to register all guests before issuing settlement details. This is a legal requirement.
tourismGate.step2: Add each guest's name and document photos
tourismGate.step3: Return here to view your settlement

settlementDayGate.title: Settling in opens on check-in day
settlementDayGate.description: Wi‑Fi, house rules, and your room details unlock from {time} on your check-in day.
settlementDayGate.body: You can complete guest registration here now. The rest of settling in will be available once check-in starts.

preTrip.title: Before Your Trip
preTrip.description: From landing in the country to check-in at the hostel and finding your bed — start here before you travel.

checkInReady.title: Check-in link or PIN
checkInReady.description: After reception assigns your bed, tap Check in on Concierge (top right) or Check in in this guide to enter your PIN or link. Door codes and your room map unlock once you're signed in.

luggage.title: Luggage Storage
luggage.description: You can arrive before {time} or leave your bags after check-out. Luggage storage at the reception is completely free!

sundayClosure.title: Sunday Closure
sundayClosure.description: Sunday in Bosnia — a non-working day. Shops, supermarkets and most establishments are closed. Plan your purchases!

directions.fromSubtitle: From which location are you arriving?
directions.trustDisclaimer: Route verified by the hostel. Use our step-by-step guide for local stops and tickets.
directions.routeFeedbackLink: Route didn't work? Message us on WhatsApp
directions.routeFeedbackMessage: Hi! I'm following your route guide ({route}). Something seems wrong:

schedule.title: Savet za red voznje
schedule.line1: Proveri polaske pre nego sto krenes ka stanici.
schedule.line2: Uvece i vikendom razmaci izmedju vozila su obicno duzi.

payment.title: Placanje karte
payment.line1: Imaj sitan kes u lokalnoj valuti.
payment.line2: Na nekim linijama karta se placa samo kod vozaca.

directions.openWalkingRouteInMaps: Open walking route in Google Maps

find.heading: Find your hostel
find.photosHiddenHint: Use the address from the route step and message reception if you cannot find the building.

intro.title: Tourist registration ({country})
intro.description: {country} requires each person staying at the accommodation to be registered separately. Upload the required identity documents for each guest.

privacy.title: Why we collect this data
privacy.body: Your accommodation is required by law to register foreign guests with the local tourism authority. We collect your name, a photo of your passport, and entry stamp solely for this purpose. Your data is accessible only to the reception staff and the government tourism office. Document images are automatically deleted within 90 days after checkout. For access or deletion requests, contact reception.

guestList.heading: Added guests
guestList.empty: No guests added yet. Add everyone who will stay in your room or bed.

contact.heading: Contact for this stay
contact.hint: One number for the whole stay — we may contact this person about registration.

finish.confirmLabel: Everyone staying at this accommodation is listed above
finish.privacyConfirmLabel: I have read and understand how my guest data is used

fieldErrors.fileTooLarge: Image is too large. Use a photo under 10 MB.
fieldErrors.processingFailed: Could not process this image. Try another photo.

errors.unauthorized: Sign in with your check-in link or PIN first.
errors.featureDisabled: Tourist registration is not enabled for this hostel.
errors.registrationClosed: Registration is already complete — you cannot add more guests.
errors.invalidInput: Check names and photos, then try again.
errors.invalidFile: One of the photos was rejected. Use a clear JPG or PNG.
errors.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Check your connection and try again.
errors.dbUnavailable: Service is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
errors.invalidWhatsapp: Enter a valid WhatsApp number with country code.
errors.noGuests: Add at least one guest before completing.

planning.title: When you're inside
planning.description: After you enter, connect to Wi-Fi below and read the house rules. Visit reception during opening hours to pay and register your passport.

atDoor.title: You're in!
atDoor.description: Use the door codes from the Access tab. Visit reception in the morning to pay and register your passport.

atDesk.title: Welcome at reception
atDesk.description: Complete your payment and show your passport for mandatory tourist registration. Wi-Fi and house rules are below.

memories.title: Share your memories
memories.subtitle: Upload your favourite hostel photos or videos.

concierge.arrivalGuideButton: How to get to the hostel (Guide)

checkIn.metaDescription: Open your personal check-in link, scan the QR from reception, or enter the 6-digit PIN from your paper slip.

waiting.title: Open your link or enter your PIN
waiting.description: Reception sends a personal link, QR, or a 6-digit PIN on paper after your bed is assigned. Enter the PIN here if you are offline — we sync when you are back online.

intent.metaDescription: Choose where you are — we'll open the right step in your arrival guide, from travel prep to your bed.
intent.title: Where are you now?
intent.description: Pick what matches your situation. We'll jump to the right part of your guide — before travel, at the door, or at reception.

pin.label: Check-in PIN
pin.hint: 6 digits from the paper slip reception gave you
pin.queuedDescription: Your PIN is saved on this phone. We will finish check-in automatically when you are back online.

invalid_pin.title: PIN not recognized
invalid_pin.description: Double-check the 6 digits on your slip or ask reception for a new code.

expired.title: Stay ended
expired.description: This PIN has expired. Visit reception if you are still staying with us.

revoked.title: Access revoked
revoked.description: Reception cancelled this PIN. Ask for a new one at the desk.

db_unavailable.title: Temporary error
db_unavailable.description: We could not verify your PIN. Try again in a moment.

too_many_attempts.title: Too many tries
too_many_attempts.description: Wait about 15 minutes, then try again or ask reception for help.

crossHostel.title: Checked in elsewhere
crossHostel.description: You are registered at {registeredHostel} (bed {bed}). You are viewing {currentHostel} now.
crossHostel.stayHereHint: To use this hostel's guest app, get a new check-in link from its reception.

checkInRequired.title: Get your check-in link
checkInRequired.description: Reception sends a personal link or QR after your bed is assigned. Often before you arrive — not only at the desk.
checkInRequired.step1: Contact reception once your bed is assigned
checkInRequired.step2: Ask for your check-in link, QR, or 6-digit PIN once your bed is assigned
checkInRequired.step3: Open the link or enter the PIN on this phone to unlock door codes and concierge
checkInRequired.whatsappMessage: Hi, I need my check-in link for {hostelName}
checkInRequired.noContact: Contact reception when your bed is assigned to get your check-in link.

wrongHostel.title: Wrong hostel link
wrongHostel.description: This check-in link belongs to {hostel}. Open it on the correct guest app subdomain.

invalid_token.title: Link not recognized
invalid_token.description: This check-in link is invalid or already replaced. Ask reception for a new QR code.

expired.title: Stay ended
expired.description: This check-in link has expired. Visit reception if you are still staying with us.

revoked.title: Access revoked
revoked.description: Reception cancelled this check-in link. Ask for a new one at the desk.

wrong_hostel.title: Wrong hostel
wrong_hostel.description: This link belongs to another hostel. Use the button below to open the correct guest app.

db_unavailable.title: Temporary error
db_unavailable.description: We could not verify your link. Try again in a moment or ask reception for help.

no_tenant.title: Hostel not found
no_tenant.description: Open the guest app from your hostel subdomain or booking link.

postWhatsapp.title: Already sorted with reception?
postWhatsapp.description: Open the arrival guide for directions and trip prep. After reception sends your PIN or link, use Check in (top right on Concierge) to unlock Wi‑Fi and door codes.

arrivalCallout.arrivalDescription: Directions, reception hours, and what to expect before and during check-in.
arrivalCallout.exploreDescription: Browse the guest app for city tips before you arrive.

comingSoon.title: Coming soon
comingSoon.description: Direct booking for this hostel is being set up. Contact us or use the arrival guide in the app.

subscriptionNotice.expired: Online guest guide is temporarily unavailable. Contact and availability details are below.
subscriptionNotice.scheduled: Guest app opens soon. Contact the hostel for check-in until then.
subscriptionNotice.scheduledWithDate: Guest app expected from {date}. Contact the hostel for check-in until then.

recovery.metaDescription: Open the link from your booking confirmation or choose your hostel to continue.
recovery.title: Find your hostel
recovery.primaryHint: Use the link from your booking confirmation, email, or QR code at the hostel. That link already points to the right place.
recovery.slugRequired: Enter a hostel code to continue.
recovery.lookupHint: The code is usually in your booking link, before the domain name.
recovery.supportHint: Still stuck? Contact your hostel directly — they can resend the correct link.

notFound.title: Hostel not found
notFound.description: This link does not match an active hostel. Check the address or return to the home page.
notFound.directoryTitle: Other hostels you can open now

offline.metaDescription: Online check-in info is unavailable. Contact the hostel for arrival details.
offline.noContact: Contact details are not available online. If you have a booking, try the phone number from your confirmation email.
offline.staleLinkHint: If you saved this link from a past booking, it may no longer work.
offline.directoryTitle: Other hostels you can open now
offline.whatsappMessage: Hi, I have a booking and your guest app link doesn't work — what should I do for check-in?
offline.whatsappMessageScheduled: Hi, I have a booking — the guest app is not live yet. What should I do for check-in?
offline.whatsappMessageArchived: Hi, I have a question about my stay at your hostel.

expired.title: Online guest guide unavailable
expired.description: Check-in instructions are no longer available here. Contact the hostel to confirm your arrival and next steps.

scheduled.title: Opening soon
scheduled.description: The guest app is not live yet. Contact the hostel for check-in details until then.

archived.title: No longer available online
archived.description: This property is no longer listed here. Contact the hostel directly if you have a booking.

expired.title: Pretplata je istekla
expired.description: Landing stranica ostaje online za upite. Obnovite pretplatu da biste vratili guest app.

scheduled.title: Pretplata još nije počela
scheduled.description: Landing je aktivan za upite. Guest app se otvara na datum početka ispod.

archived.title: Hostel je arhiviran
archived.description: Gosti ne mogu da otvore vaše sajtove. Kontaktirajte podršku za obnovu pristupa.

subscription.title: Pretplata
subscription.readOnlyHint: Datume upravlja Frontdesk Mate. Za promenu plana kontaktirajte podršku.

editAccess.readOnlyNotice: Izmena je onemogućena dok ne obnovite pretplatu ili ne vratite hostel. I dalje možete da pregledate podešavanja.

login.title: Prijava
login.subtitle: Portal za vlasnike vašeg hostela.
login.connectionError: Prijava nije uspela. Proverite konekciju i pokušajte ponovo.

signup.title: Kreiraj nalog
signup.subtitle: Registrujte se kao vlasnik hostela.
signup.confirmEmail: Proverite email da potvrdite nalog, zatim se prijavite.
signup.connectionError: Registracija nije uspela. Proverite konekciju i pokušajte ponovo.

onboarding.title: Kreirajte hostel
onboarding.subtitle: Izaberite javni slug i city pack. Datumi pretplate se postavljaju automatski kada se hostel kreira.
onboarding.cityPackHint: Rute, lokalni vodič i podrazumevani taksi za vaš grad. Kasnije se ne može menjati.
onboarding.noCityPacks: Trenutno nema dostupnih city pack-ova. Pokušajte kasnije ili zatražite grad ispod.

setup.title: Podešavanje
setup.wizardTeaser: Podešavanje se nastavlja u launch wizard-u (Modul 5). Brending, sobe, arrival access i još toga — u vođenim koracima.

wizard.subscriptionSeeAbove: Datumi pretplate su prikazani iznad — kontaktirajte podršku za promenu plana.

toast.savedIncomplete: Sačuvano — još {count} obaveznih stavki na guest path-u
toast.readOnly: Izmena je onemogućena za vaš status naloga.
toast.saveFailed: Čuvanje nije uspelo. Pokušajte ponovo ili kontaktirajte podršku.

identity.title: Identitet i pretplata
identity.description: Ime hostela i logo koje gosti vide na landing-u i u app-u.

contacts-landing.title: Recepcija i landing
contacts-landing.description: Telefon recepcije, politika boravka, hero slika i javni landing.

booking.title: Put rezervacije
booking.description: Online engine ili WhatsApp rezervacije sa landing hero-a i kartica soba.

arrival.title: Dolazak
arrival.description: Adresa, hod do vrata i pristup za goste.

room-map.title: Minimum mape soba
room-map.description: Pregled kreveta, rasporeda i navigacije za settlement.

preview.title: Pregled i objava
preview.description: Proverite spremnost guest path-a i podelite linkove.

settings.title: Postavke
settings.subtitle: Puna konfiguracija hostela. Za vođeno podešavanje, vratite se na

unsavedNav.title: Nesačuvane izmene
unsavedNav.description: Izmene ostaju u formi dok ne sačuvate. Možete preći u drugu sekciju i nastaviti uređivanje ili odbaciti i vratiti poslednju sačuvanu verziju.

toast.savedIncomplete: Sačuvano — još {count} stavki konfiguracije nije završeno
toast.readOnly: Vaša pretplata ne dozvoljava izmenu postavki.

receptionDesk.title: PIN za recepciju
receptionDesk.description: Osoblje koristi ovaj PIN za prijavu na sajt recepcije — ne za goste.
receptionDesk.pinHint: Najmanje 6 karaktera. Ostavite prazno da zadržite trenutni PIN.
receptionDesk.setupHint: Prijava na recepciju koristi poseban PIN za osoblje.

cityPack.inheritedDescription: Hub rute i tekstovi prevoza su zajednički za vaš grad. Vi prilagodite samo adresu i poslednji deo hoda do hostela.
cityPack.managedHint: Sadržaj city pack-a održava Frontdesk Mate.
cityPack.noPlaces: Još nema mesta u vašem city pack-u.

cityRequest.title: Zatražite podršku za grad
cityRequest.description: Recite nam koji grad vam treba ili koji pack još nije spreman. Zahteve pregledamo ručno i javljamo se na email vašeg naloga.

form.messagePlaceholder: Sve što nam pomaže da prioritizujemo zahtev

kind.new_city: Novi grad — još nije na listi
kind.pack_not_ready: City pack postoji, ali nije spreman za goste

success.title: Zahtev je primljen
success.body: Hvala — imamo vaš zahtev. Tim će vam se javiti kada imamo novost.

error.duplicate: Već imate aktivan zahtev za ovaj grad u poslednjih 7 dana.

guestCheckIn.hint: Trip tips and directions are open to everyone. Door codes and your bed map unlock after check-in — tap

tourismGate.title: Complete guest registration
tourismGate.description: Your accommodation needs to register all guests before issuing settlement details. This is a legal requirement.
tourismGate.step2: Add each guest's name and document photos
tourismGate.step3: Return here to view your settlement

settlementDayGate.title: Settling in opens on check-in day
settlementDayGate.description: Wi‑Fi, house rules, and your room details unlock from {time} on your check-in day.
settlementDayGate.body: You can complete guest registration here now. The rest of settling in will be available once check-in starts.

registration.completeHint: Guest registration and contact details are complete.
registration.incompleteHint: Complete guest registration and contact details on the registration page.

intro.title: Tourist registration ({country})
intro.description: {country} requires each person staying at the accommodation to be registered separately. Upload the required identity documents for each guest.

privacy.title: Why we collect this data
privacy.body: Your accommodation is required by law to register foreign guests with the local tourism authority. We collect your name, a photo of your passport, and entry stamp solely for this purpose. Your data is accessible only to the reception staff and the government tourism office. Document images are automatically deleted within 90 days after checkout. For access or deletion requests, contact reception.

guestList.heading: Added guests
guestList.empty: No guests added yet. Add everyone who will stay in your room or bed.

contact.heading: Contact for this stay
contact.hint: One number for the whole stay — we may contact this person about registration.

finish.confirmLabel: Everyone staying at this accommodation is listed above
finish.privacyConfirmLabel: I have read and understand how my guest data is used

fieldErrors.fileTooLarge: Image is too large. Use a photo under 10 MB.
fieldErrors.processingFailed: Could not process this image. Try another photo.

errors.unauthorized: Sign in with your check-in link or PIN first.
errors.featureDisabled: Tourist registration is not enabled for this hostel.
errors.registrationClosed: Registration is already complete — you cannot add more guests.
errors.invalidInput: Check names and photos, then try again.
errors.invalidFile: One of the photos was rejected. Use a clear JPG or PNG.
errors.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Check your connection and try again.
errors.dbUnavailable: Service is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
errors.invalidWhatsapp: Enter a valid WhatsApp number with country code.
errors.noGuests: Add at least one guest before completing.

planning.title: When you're inside
planning.description: After you enter, connect to Wi-Fi below and read the house rules. Visit reception during opening hours to pay and register your passport.

atDoor.title: You're in!
atDoor.description: Use the door codes from the Access tab. Visit reception in the morning to pay and register your passport.

atDesk.title: Welcome at reception
atDesk.description: Complete your payment and show your passport for mandatory tourist registration. Wi-Fi and house rules are below.

contact.title: Contact for this stay
contact.description: Reception may need to reach you about registration, your room, or stay. Use the WhatsApp number you check regularly.
contact.hint: One WhatsApp number for the whole booking.

errors.invalidWhatsapp: Enter a valid WhatsApp number with country code.

essentials.rulesAckLabel: I have read the house rules

room.title: Find your bed
room.description: See your room on the map and how to get there from reception.

errors.noFiles: Please select at least one file.
errors.fileTooLarge: One or more files exceed the 100MB limit. Select smaller ones.
errors.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

fileZone.prompt: Click to upload photos or videos

success.title: Thank you for sharing!
success.description: Your memories have been successfully uploaded.

hero.whatsappDatesHint: Reception will reply in chat — your dates are included in the message.

nightAccess.title: Night return access codes
nightAccess.description: If you go out at night, use these codes to get back in. Do not ring the doorbell.
nightAccess.descriptionHostelOnly: If you go out at night, use the hostel door code below. There is no building entrance code.

findYourBed.title: Find your bed
findYourBed.fallback: Your bed assignment is not configured yet. Ask at reception or message us on WhatsApp.

taxi.whatsappTaxiMessage: Hello! Please send a taxi to {pickupPoint}. Destination: {address}.
taxi.receptionTaxiMessage: Hi {hostelName}! I'm at {pickupPoint} and need a taxi to {address}. Can you help me book one?
taxi.noTaxiNumber: No taxi number configured — use WhatsApp reception to help book a ride.
taxi.noContactFallback: Contact details are not configured yet.

preCheckInBanner.description: Pre dolaska završite registraciju gostiju i ostavite broj telefona na koji vas možemo kontaktirati.

settlementBanner.description: Povežite se na Wi‑Fi, pročitajte kućni red i pronađite sobu na dan ili pre dana prijave.

nightAccessSheet.dismiss: I picked up my room key

packNightBefore.title: Pack the night before
packNightBefore.description: Pack your things the evening before checkout so you can leave quietly in the morning without waking roommates.

checkout.lateCheckoutHint: Need a later checkout? Ask at reception.

helpBullets.luggage: Luggage storage before check-in or after checkout
helpBullets.laundry: Laundry and on-site questions about your room

reception.taxiViaReception: Reception can help you book a taxi when you're out and about.
reception.selfCheckInAfter: After {time}, you can use the app door codes if reception is closed.
reception.footerHint: Use the button below to message reception.

contact.guestChatDescriptionGroup: Hostel announcements and a place to connect with other guests.
contact.guestChatDescriptionReception: Message reception with questions about your stay.
contact.guestChatMessage: Hi, I have a question about my stay at {hostelName}
contact.guestChatTeaser: Check in to open the hostel WhatsApp chat.

registrationAlert.title: Settle Payment & Passport.
registrationAlert.description: Stop by the reception tomorrow after {time} for mandatory tourist registration and payment.

hostelFeatures.title: Why Travelers Choose Us
hostelFeatures.subtitle: Essentials and comforts for a smooth hostel stay.

guestStayChip.receptionHint: Show this screen if reception asks who you are.
guestStayChip.bedLockedUntilCheckIn: Your bed and directions unlock from {time} on your check-in day.
guestStayChip.bedLockedUntilTourism: Complete tourist registration to see your bed assignment.
guestStayChip.tourismSummaryNotStarted: Add each guest and upload the required documents.
guestStayChip.tourismSummaryInProgress: {count} guest added — finish documents for everyone in your group.
guestStayChip.tourismSummaryInProgress_other: {count} guests added — finish documents for everyone in your group.
guestStayChip.extendStayNotice: Extensions are handled at reception. Your app access matches your booked nights — after extending, ask reception to refresh your access if door codes stop working.
guestStayChip.extendStayMessage: Hi! I'd like to extend my stay at {hostelName}. I'm in bed {bedLabel}, currently until {checkoutDate}. Ref #{stayRef}. How many nights can I add?
guestStayChip.extendStayMessageNamed: Hi! I'd like to extend my stay at {hostelName}. I'm in bed {bedLabel}, currently until {checkoutDate}. Ref #{stayRef}. Registered as {guestName}. How many nights can I add?

conciergeContact.receptionStripHint: Questions about your stay, laundry, or checkout
conciergeContact.whatsappMessage: Hi, I have a question about my stay at {hostelName}

guestIssue.cardTitle: Notice a fault in the hostel?
guestIssue.cardDescription: Shower, door, bed, Wi‑Fi… Reception sees it on their screen.
guestIssue.sheetDescription: Tell reception what needs fixing in your room.
guestIssue.privacyNotice: Only reception sees this. Used to fix the problem in your room — not shared publicly.
guestIssue.successBody: Your report was sent. Ref #{stayRef} is included.
guestIssue.successUrgent: For urgent help, message reception on WhatsApp.
guestIssue.successWhatsappMessage: Hi, I reported an issue in my room at {hostelName}. Can you help?
guestIssue.myStayPrompt: Notice a fault in your room?

errors.unauthorized: Sign in again to send a report.
errors.tooManyOpen: You already have open reports. Ask at reception if urgent.
errors.dbUnavailable: Could not send right now. Try again or message reception.

guestExtras.opsReceptionHint: Ask at reception during opening hours.
guestExtras.laundryMessage: Hi! I'd like to use the laundry at {hostelName}. I'm in bed {bedLabel}. Ref #{stayRef}.
guestExtras.earlyCheckinMessage: Hi! I'd like to request an early check-in at {hostelName}. I'm in bed {bedLabel}. Ref #{stayRef}.
guestExtras.lateCheckoutMessage: Hi! I'd like to request a late checkout at {hostelName}. I'm in bed {bedLabel}. Ref #{stayRef}. Standard checkout is {checkoutTime}.
guestExtras.partnerTransferMessage: Hi! I'd like to book a transfer from {hostelName}. I'm in bed {bedLabel}. Ref #{stayRef}.
guestExtras.partnerTourMessage: Hi! I'm interested in the tour from {hostelName}. I'm in bed {bedLabel}. Ref #{stayRef}.
guestExtras.partnerGuideMessage: Hi! I'm interested in the local guide from {hostelName}. I'm in bed {bedLabel}. Ref #{stayRef}.

laundry.title: Laundry
laundry.description: Washing and drying on site. Reception will help you get started.

earlyCheckin.title: Early check-in
earlyCheckin.description: Arriving before standard check-in? Ask reception if an early room is available.

lateCheckout.title: Late checkout
lateCheckout.description: Need a few extra hours? Message reception before checkout time.
lateCheckout.availabilityHint: Subject to availability on checkout day.

partnerTransfer.title: Airport transfer
partnerTransfer.description: On-demand ride with our partner. Book via WhatsApp or their page.

partnerTour.title: City tour
partnerTour.description: Join a guided tour with our local partner.

partnerGuide.title: Local guide
partnerGuide.description: A paid guide for your day — book with our partner.

magicLink.title: Guest check-in ready
magicLink.subtitle: Bed {bed} · show this QR at reception or send the link
magicLink.pinHint: Write this on the guest slip — works offline, syncs when they go online
